evidence.claim: The system flags the account for review.
evidence.fact: The system monitors withdrawal patterns and automatically marks transactions that appear unusual for later human inspection.
evidence.fact_span: automatically marks transactions that appear unusual

evidence.claim: The system monitors all withdrawal transactions.
evidence.fact: All attempts to authenticate and every transition of a withdrawal's status are appended to an immutable audit trail.
evidence.user_story_span: The system monitors all withdrawal transactions.
